Settings.EnableOpen5eHint: Search the Open5e SRD API for monsters, spells, and items.
Settings.EnableWikidotHint: Scrape dnd5e.wikidot.com pages (requires proxy for CORS).
Settings.EnableDDBHint: Scrape D&D Beyond pages (requires proxy for CORS).
Settings.EnableAideddHint: Scrape aidedd.org for SRD monsters and spells (requires proxy for CORS).
Settings.EnableRoll20Hint: Scrape Roll20 compendium pages (requires proxy for CORS).
Settings.DefaultSearchPassHint: Quick = primary source only. Standard = Open5e + AideDD + Roll20. Deep = all enabled sources.
Settings.PrimarySourceHint: Which source to use in Quick search mode.
Settings.AutoCreateMacrosHint: Create a Quick Import macro on first load.
